lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in poor condition. It has significant mechanical issues and visible damage to both the exterior and interior. It requires major repairs to be roadworthy.
This vehicle is in poor condition. The interior and exterior show significant wear and damage. Mechanical and electrical systems are currently unreliable and require immediate repair.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained throughout its life. The exterior paint still holds a nice shine, though you may find a few minor stone chips and light surface scratches upon close inspection. The interior is clean and comfortable, with only minor wear on the upholstery consistent with regular use. Mechanically, it performs reliably and has been regularly serviced. It’s a solid, dependable car that presents well and is ready for the road.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained by its previous owner. Mechanically, it is very reliable; the engine starts promptly and runs smoothly, and the transmission provides consistent, predictable shifts. All major systems, including the brakes and suspension, are in proper working order. The exterior paint still holds a strong luster, though there are minor cosmetic imperfections such as small stone chips and light surface scratches consistent with careful use. Inside, the upholstery is clean and free of major tears or stains, though some light wear is visible on high-touch surfaces. This car is a solid choice for someone looking for a dependable vehicle that has many miles left to offer.

Get ready to drive home a true masterpiece! This car is in absolute mint condition, looking and performing just like it did the day it was first sold. It has been pampered and meticulously maintained, showing virtually no signs of wear. For the buyer who demands the very best, this pristine vehicle is ready for its next home!
Mint condition.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, reflecting a standard of preservation that transcends the ordinary. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the untouched interior appointments, underscores its status as an investment-grade acquisition. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from its original debut. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than absolute perfection.

Hey guys! You seriously have to see this beauty. 🚗 I’ve absolutely babied this car from day one, and it is in total mint condition—honestly, it still looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! No scratches, no dents, just pure perfection. I’m sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely love it. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Offering an investment-grade E46 M3, a pinnacle of atmospheric engineering. This specimen features the high-revving S54 straight-six, boasting individual throttle bodies and a precision-calibrated VANOS system for optimal torque across the rev range. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission offers short, tactile throws, feeding power to a variable M differential lock. Mechanically impeccable, the chassis has undergone preventative subframe reinforcement and features refreshed bushings for razor-sharp turn-in. Finished in pristine factory paint with a flawless interior, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity to own a mechanically synchronized, collector
Pristine condition. Flawless interior and exterior. Garage kept. Full service records. No mechanical issues.

This vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of preservation, presenting in showroom condition as if it just rolled off the assembly line. The exterior paint retains a mirror-like finish with zero chips, swirls, or imperfections, while the factory wheels are completely free of curb rash. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium leather seats show no wear or bolstering fatigue, and every electronic component—from the infotainment system to the climate control—operates with precision. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, having been exclusively serviced by master technicians with a comprehensive folder of maintenance records included. Garage-kept under a breathable cover and never driven in inclement weather, this single-owner gem offers a rare chance to own a flawless piece of automotive history. Experience the tight handling and smooth power delivery of a car that has been cherished rather than just driven.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, reflecting meticulous stewardship and a commitment to preservation. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior appointments, underscores its status as a premier acquisition for the discerning collector. We invite you to experience a level of refinement that is increasingly rare in the pre-owned market.

Presenting a definitive example of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in pristine condition, reflecting meticulous maintenance and an uncompromising standard of care. From its flawless exterior finish to the preserved interior surfaces, it offers an ownership experience indistinguishable from its original delivery. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a peerless specimen tailored for the discerning collector.

Hey there! You seriously have to see this beauty in person—it’s in absolutely pristine condition and looks just as good as the day it left the showroom! I’ve taken such incredible care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically flawless and ready for a new home, this is definitely the one for you. Let’s get you behind the wheel!

Offering a museum-grade E46 M3 in collector condition. This example features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a high-revving 8,000 RPM redline. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides precise, tactile engagement, paired with a perfectly calibrated M Variable Differential Lock. Mechanically impeccable, the vehicle has undergone proactive rod bearing replacement and a comprehensive Vanos overhaul. The chassis is structurally flawless with reinforced subframe mounts and refreshed bushings, ensuring the sharp handling characteristics the M-division intended. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the exterior retains a deep luster with zero oxidation or panel misalignment. This is a purist’s specification, free of aftermarket modifications, representing the pinnacle of naturally aspirated German engineering.
Mint condition. Low mileage. Garage kept. Clean title. No accidents. Serviced regularly.

This is a rare opportunity to own a truly showroom-quality vehicle that has been meticulously preserved since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero chips, scratches, or swirl marks, protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating and a history of strict hand-washing. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather seats show no wear, and every surface—from the dashboard to the custom floor mats—is completely blemish-free. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach. It has been serviced exclusively at authorized dealerships with a full, documented history of preventative maintenance. It drives exactly as it did on the showroom floor: the engine is whisper-quiet, the shifts are seamless, and the handling is tight and responsive. Always garage-kept in a climate-controlled environment and never driven in inclement weather, this vehicle is a collector-grade specimen for the most discerning buyer who demands absolute perfection.

Presented in pristine, showroom condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Every detail, from the lustrous paintwork to the immaculate interior, reflects a standard of care that is truly exceptional. This is an investment-grade specimen for the discerning buyer who demands uncompromising quality and peak performance.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen in showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Mechanically beyond reproach, this vehicle has been curated for the most discerning enthusiast who demands perfection without compromise.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor? I’m parting with my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, it’s in incredible shape! I’ve babied this car since day one—no scratches, no spills, just pure perfection. It drives like a dream and is ready for its next adventure. You won’t find another one this clean! Come take a look, you're going to love it!

Offering a collector-grade E46 M3, showcasing the pinnacle of the S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six. This example features impeccable VANOS timing, reinforced rear subframe mounting points, and a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission. The limited-slip differential operates with factory-spec lockup, and the suspension maintains its original damping rates with zero bushing deflection. Meticulously maintained with an unblemished chassis, this vehicle represents a turnkey investment for the discerning purist seeking mechanical perfection and high-revving performance.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. Clean title. No accidents.

This vehicle is a true 'time capsule' example, presenting in flawless showroom condition. Meticulously garage-kept by a single owner, the exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like luster with zero rock chips, dings, or swirl marks, further enhanced by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine, factory-fresh state; the premium leather upholstery shows no bolster wear, and the interior retains its original new-car scent. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver-assist features, functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, supported by a documented history of preventative maintenance performed exclusively at authorized dealerships. With exceptionally low mileage and a chassis that feels as tight as the day it was built, this car offers a rare, turn-key experience for the most discerning collector or enthusiast who settles for nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in absolute showroom condition. This unit represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation, featuring an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Meticulously serviced and stored in a climate-controlled environment, it offers a peerless driving experience for the discerning collector. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such uncompromising caliber and investment-grade quality.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained to the highest standards of preservation. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the untouched interior upholstery, reflects an uncompromising commitment to quality. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a peerless vehicle that satisfies even the most discerning collector's requirements.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've taken such good care of it, and it's been kept spotless inside and out. If you're looking for a ride that's been truly pampered and is ready for its next adventure, this is definitely the one. I'd love to see it go to someone who will enjoy it as much as I have! Feel free to reach out if you want to take a look.

This 2004 BMW M3 is a superlative example of the E46 chassis, featuring the legendary S54B32 3.2L inline-six powerplant. The engine delivers razor-sharp throttle response via six individual throttle bodies and is mated to a desirable Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. This specimen features a reinforced rear subframe and has received comprehensive preventative maintenance, including a full VANOS overhaul and rod bearing replacement. The factory suspension remains tight, utilizing aluminum control arms and a variable M differential lock to ensure peak lateral grip and mechanical harmony. Presented in concours-level condition with an immaculate interior and original paint depth, this M3 offers an unfiltered analog driving experience for the discerning collector.
Mint condition. Flawless exterior. Pristine interior. Full service history. No accidents.

This vehicle is an absolute masterpiece of preservation, presenting in showroom condition both inside and out. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, while the interior remains in an impeccable state, featuring supple, uncreased leather and a cabin that still retains its factory-fresh scent. Every mechanical component has been meticulously maintained with a comprehensive, documented service history, ensuring a driving experience that is indistinguishable from the day it rolled off the assembly line. Always garage-kept under a breathable cover and exclusively hand-washed, this car represents the pinnacle of its model year. From the pristine engine bay to the untouched undercarriage, every detail reflects a life of pampered ownership. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector to acquire a truly flawless example.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. An acquisition of this pedigree represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands uncompromising quality and mechanical integrity.
